name: Maple Date Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the whole wheat flour, baking powder, and baking soda.
2. Add the chopped dates, maple syrup, egg whites, and vanilla to the dry ingredients.
3. Beat until all ingredients are smoothly mixed.
4. Spread the batter evenly in a nonstick or lightly oiled regular 8-inch square pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes, or until the cake is golden brown, just begins to pull from the pan sides, and springs back when lightly touched in the center.
6. Serve warm or cool, cut into about 2-inch squares.
7. Store as directed.
